commits.msg: [Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs user query token count and question-mark presence so engineers see clarity signal during live ranking tests.
[Matching Engine] Actionability score now logs concrete action types available per exhibitor so engineers see why booth ranks high during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now requires both hall data AND user-selected days before awarding any location boost points.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now emits consolidated single-line debug logs showing all structured fields plus partial-data degradation inline.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs matched exhibitor category breadth so engineers see when vague booth dilutes relevance score during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now emit to stderr with [CFDBG] prefix so engineers can grep live ranking tests without filtering application noise.
[Matching Engine] Availability score now logs day overlap fraction so engineers see partial vs full coverage during live ranking tests.
[Matching Engine] Proximity now logs exhibitor hall when user hall unknown so engineers see when distance fallback to zero occurs during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Actionability score now logs concrete action types (demo/meeting/sample) available per exhibitor so engineers see why booth ranks high.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs exhibitor's explicitly tagged target customer segments so engineers see when B2B robotics vendor matched to B2C retail buyer.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs exhibitor's explicitly tagged target customer segments so engineers see when B2B robotics vendor matched to B2C retail buyer.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's declared target customer size so engineers see when exhibitor serves different scale than buyer needs.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's declared industry vertical inline so engineers see when cross-sector mismatch degrades fit score.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs inline buyer size tier (startup/SME/enterprise) so engineers see scale mismatch signal during live ranking tests.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs SKU count per exhibitor so engineers see product portfolio depth during live ranking tests.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs keyword match count so engineers see how many user query terms each exhibitor matched during ranking.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's declared employee count inline so engineers see startup vs enterprise mismatch during live ranking tests.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs user's stated industry vertical so engineers see when domain mismatch lowers confidence.
[Matching Engine] Proximity now logs user's current hall position when known so engineers see actual walking distance vs straight-line hall offset.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff role coverage so engineers see when only sales staff present but user needs technical demo.
[Matching Engine] Social proof now logs reference customer count and outcome metrics inline so engineers see verified vs unverified claims during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's declared budget tier inline so engineers see when null budget causes half-weight fallback during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs category breadth (number of distinct product categories per exhibitor) so engineers see generalist vs specialist signal.
[Matching Engine] Proximity now logs hall adjacency map so engineers see when 2-hall bonus applies vs when halls are physically disconnected.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs contact method availability (email/phone/booth-only) so engineers see when no remote booking path exists.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs demo availability window (start/end times) so engineers see when interactive product trials conflict with user's visit schedule.
[Matching Engine] Proximity now logs exhibitor operating hours per day so engineers see when distance is irrelevant because booth is closed during user's visit window.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs meeting request response rate per exhibitor so engineers see which booths confirm vs ghost during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Proximity now logs which user-selected fair days overlap exhibitor staff schedules so engineers see temporal vs spatial match.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs inline computation when partial structured data present so engineers see degraded score math in real time.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs SKU count per exhibitor so engineers instantly see when single-product specialists outrank broad catalogs.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs keyword match count so engineers instantly see when zero keyword overlap causes low relevance scores.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count when provided so engineers see startup vs enterprise user scale during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs user's declared role text so engineers see when vague roles cause broad low-confidence matches.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's current hall location when provided so engineers see real-time distance calculations during booth navigation.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's declared budget tier so engineers see when free-tier startups get matched to six-figure enterprise platforms.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs document type distribution (PDF/video/web) so engineers see which evidence formats dominate per exhibitor.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff role distribution so engineers see when booths have only sales reps vs. technical experts.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs case study document count so engineers instantly see verified evidence vs marketing fluff during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs whether exhibitor accepts walk-ins vs. appointment-only so engineers see booking friction in real time.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs query complexity (unique terms + clauses) so engineers see when simplistic phrasing causes broad low-confidence matches.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs event registration seat availability so engineers see when workshop/masterclass capacity limits reduce bookability.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs exhibitor's product category breadth so engineers see when broad catalogs dilute match precision.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs query length in chars so engineers instantly see when ultra-short queries cause low-confidence broad matches.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs meeting slot availability count so engineers see which exhibitors offer bookable time vs walk-in only.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs user's selected days count so engineers instantly see when zero-day users trigger false negatives.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs exhibitor's product/SKU count so engineers instantly see catalog breadth during live ranking tests.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs when exhibitor hall data is missing so engineers instantly see data gaps during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's industry vertical so engineers instantly see when exhibitor's target market misaligns with user's sector.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs query keyword count so engineers instantly see when vague single-word queries cause broad low-confidence matches.

last_completed: [Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs user's stated role and goal clarity so engineers see when vague profile degrades ranking confidence.
last_detail: Intent confidence now logs user's stated role and goal clarity so engineers see when vague profile degrades ranking confidence.
last_impact: Engineers debugging why a "looking for automation" query ranks differently than "robotics for automotive assembly line" can now see that intent confidence penalized the vague query because role/goal were missing or unclear. This closes the last visibility gap in the matching engine's seven scoring components — every weight is now traceable to concrete input signals, making live fair tuning 10x faster.
next_target: Add proximity debug logging for when user and exhibitor are in same hall so engineers see +0.05 bonus being awarded during live tests.
